{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Minaret
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Minaret]] was a suggested name for the world due to its giant tower.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Minaret,” Eithan suggested. “We do have a giant tower.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
